Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 313}Did you hear? The new transfer student's gonna be in 2-F.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 313}Oh my gosh, what if he turns out to be really cute? Wanna go steal a peek?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_000_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 314}Oh yeah, apparently he's staying at Iwatodai Dorm—the one Takeba-san's staying at.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 314}But isn't it kinda weird to transfer schools as a second-year? I wonder if he was a troublemaker at his last school...[n]{f 1 1}
